MOTION To Seal Certificates Of Merit; Application Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 340.1 For An In Camera Review And Finding Reasonable And Meritorious Cause For Filing Of Action; Permit Service On Doe Defendants; For An Order To Seal And Keep Confidential All Certificates Of Merit; And Declaration Of Paul Mones
Off Calendar Feb-23-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOHN DOE R.V.'S MOTION To Seal Certificates Of Merit; Application Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 340.1 For An In Camera Review And Finding Reasonable And Meritorious Cause For Filing Of Action; Permit Service On Doe Defendants; For An Order To Seal And Keep Confidential All Certificates Of Merit

Grant. Moving party to submit a proposed order approved as to form.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CK)
